videos.headline: Miami takes down Virginia Tech on the road
videos.description: Miami shines on the road as they cruise past Virginia Tech 34-17.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Miami takes down Virginia Tech on the road) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck finds Elija Lofton for 20-yard TD
videos.description: Elija Lofton hauls in a 20-yard touchdown pass from Carson Beck to put Miami up 7-0.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck finds Elija Lofton for 20-yard TD) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck connects with Mark Fletcher Jr. for 3-yard TD
videos.description: Carson Beck throws to Mark Fletcher Jr. in the end zone to extend Miami's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck connects with Mark Fletcher Jr. for 3-yard TD) 2025/11/22 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Carter Davis kicks 46-yard field goal) 2025/11/22 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Carter Davis kicks 40-yard field goal) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeffrey Overton Jr. finds the end zone for Virginia Tech
videos.description: Jeffrey Overton Jr. weaves his way into the end zone for a 39-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeffrey Overton Jr. finds the end zone for Virginia Tech) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Girard Pringle Jr. makes diving TD catch
videos.description: Carson Beck airs one out for Girard Pringle Jr., who makes the diving catch in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Girard Pringle Jr. makes diving TD catch) 2025/11/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: William Watson III runs for 3-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: William Watson III gets into the end zone for Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (William Watson III runs for 3-yard rushing touchdown) 2025/11/22 ESHEET
